headline: Target Andie Swimwear Test Puts Focus On Apparel And Valuation
summary: Target (NYSE:TGT) has launched an exclusive, limited-edition swimwear collection with Andie. The line is available in Target stores and online, offering a range of affordable styles and fits. The partnership introduces Andie, an emerging swimwear brand, to Target's nationwide customer base. For Target, apparel is a key part of the broader general merchandise mix, sitting alongside essentials, home, and beauty. Partnerships like this Andie collection show how large retailers continue to...
